_meta.name: Sporeus — Queue Health
_meta.description: pgmq queue depths, drain rates, DLQ activity and oldest-message age for all 5 queues.
_meta.import_instructions: Axiom → Dashboards → New → Import JSON → paste this file

charts.title: Queue depth over time (5-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "queue_metrics" | parse event_message "queue_name=\"*\" depth=*" as queue_name, depth | summarize avg(toint(depth)) by bin(_time, 5m), queue_name

charts.title: DLQ failures — ai_batch_dlq (any = page immediately)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "ai-batch-worker" | where status == "error" | summarize failures = count() by bin(_time, 5m) | where failures > 0

charts.title: Strava backfill drain rate (2-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "strava-backfill-worker" | summarize runs = count(), errors = countif(status == "error"), avg_ms = avg(duration_ms) by bin(_time, 2m)

charts.title: Push worker throughput (1-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "push-worker" | summarize runs = count(), avg_ms = avg(duration_ms) by bin(_time, 1m)

charts.title: AI batch worker throughput (2-min buckets)
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "ai-batch-worker" | where status != "error" | summarize runs = count(), avg_ms = avg(duration_ms) by bin(_time, 2m)

charts.title: Embed backfill drain rate
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn == "embed-session" | summarize runs = count(), errors = countif(status == "error"), avg_ms = avg(duration_ms) by bin(_time, 5m)

charts.title: Worker error rate by queue worker
charts.apl: ['sporeus-edge'] | where fn in ("ai-batch-worker", "strava-backfill-worker", "push-worker", "embed-session") | summarize total = count(), errors = countif(status == "error") by fn | extend error_pct = round(errors * 100.0 / total, 2) | sort by error_pct desc

charts.title: Oldest enqueued message age (seconds) — last seen
charts.apl: ['sporeus-prod'] | where event_message contains "queue_metrics" | parse event_message "queue_name=\"*\" depth=* oldest_age_s=*" as queue_name, depth, oldest_age_s | summarize last_age = max(toint(oldest_age_s)) by queue_name | sort by last_age desc
